terms.term: A time-based grouping of requests used for traffic analysis. The system groups requests by hour (for example, 9:00–9:59 or 10:00–10:59) to monitor and compare traffic patterns.
A list of IP addresses that have been identified as sources of suspicious or malicious traffic. Requests from these IP addresses automatically trigger CAPTCHA verification.
The data included in a request sent to the service, such as form fields and the values submitted by a user.
